title: OB1 Clear Multi-Surface Construction Sealant & Adhesive - Hybrid Technology - Excellent Chemical Resistance - Water Resistant - Weather Resistant - Food Safe - 290ml
features: ORIGINAL FORMULA - The Original formulation which has been on the market for 20+ years, A versatile Multi-Surface Construction Sealant & Adhesive: Perfect for bonding and sealing felt, copper, aluminium, mirrors, wood, plastic, steel, glass, tile, and mor

DURABILITY - Durable in Extreme Conditions: Maintains a strong bond from -40°C to +120°C, ideal for harsh weather and refrigerated environments. Compatible with most paints; test area when using synthetic or oil-based paints.

FOOD SAFE & UNDERWATER - Can be applied underwater thanks to its hybrid polymer formulation - acts as a structural underwater bond in closed-face applications in swimming pools such as floor and wall tiles without the need to drain the pool, ISEGA approve
ODOURLESS - Eco-Friendly & Odourless: Safe for residential, domestic, and industrial use. Contains no solvents or isocyanates, earning an A+ air quality rating.
